sources.title: Intrinsic carrier concentrations in Hg1-xCdxTe with the use of Fermi-Dirac statistics
Intrinsic Carrier Concentrations in Long Wavelength HgCdTe Based on the New, Nonlinear Temperature Dependence of Eg(x,T)
sources.source_role: open primary precursor reproducing the Lowney calculation architecture and citing Madarasz equations
sources.reason_exact_equations_not_verified: The official PDF is available, but machine text extraction corrupts the typography of printed Eqs. (2)-(4); no symbol-level transcription is accepted without visual equation review.

sources.title: Intrinsic Carrier Concentration of Narrow-Gap Mercury Cadmium Telluride Based on the Nonlinear Temperature Dependence of the Bandgap
sources.source_role: final journal intrinsic-density relation and fit

recovered_model_architecture.valence_nondegenerate_condition_reported: valence-band edge more than 4 k_B T below the Fermi energy
recovered_model_architecture.momentum_matrix_element_dependence: constant in the Seiler-Lowney calculation; Madarasz varied it by a few percent with composition
recovered_model_architecture.neutrality_solver: Newton iteration for reduced Fermi energy eta
recovered_model_architecture.electron_integral_acceleration: integration by parts removes the derivative from the integrand
recovered_model_architecture.kane_inversion: invert the cubic secular equation to obtain gamma=k^2 as a function of energy

required_before_implementation: visual symbol-by-symbol transcription of Eqs. (2)-(4) from an equation-quality primary copy
unit and normalization contract from Ry/atomic units to repository units
independent numerical reference points for neutrality and intrinsic density
verified Lowney 1992 fitted relation if that fit is to be implemented
